skills.description: Select the optimal 3D printing process and material for a given part — FDM, SLA, SLS, MJF, DMLS
Autonomous audit of existing directory entries — verify websites, flag stale data, identify missing fields, and open correction PRs
Map battery-powered product risks to cell, pack, charger, transport, BIS, and export safety requirements
Convert CAD concepts into manufacturing-ready DFM handoff packets for CNC, sheet-metal, and injection moulding
Review CAD assemblies for tolerance stack-up risk and recommend mitigation before tooling or pilot builds
Map any hardware product to its required Indian certifications and the labs/bodies that handle each
Select reliable connectors for hardware products using current, vibration, mating-cycle, environment, and sourcing constraints
Design for Manufacturability review — identify issues before sending to production
Build an EMC pre-compliance plan for electronics before formal lab testing, covering emissions, immunity, ESD, and design fixes
Plan enclosure sealing, gasket, vent, and test strategy for IP-rated hardware products
Rough BOM cost estimation for Indian market — component, assembly, and NRE breakdown
Export compliance for India-made hardware — CE, FCC, UKCA marks, dual-use controls, DGFT requirements, and SCOMET classification
Review hardware for maintainability, repair, replacement, diagnostics, spares, and field-service workflows before launch
Find CAD design consultants and product-design studios by domain, deliverable type, and city
Match a hardware startup's stage and domain to the right Indian incubator, accelerator, or government program
Find PCB fabrication houses in India matched to your board specs and volume
Find the right testing lab for a hardware product given certification type and location
Plan first-power firmware bring-up for embedded hardware with boot, debug, peripheral, and fault-isolation gates
Check whether a hardware startup is ready to apply for grants and prepare a focused evidence pack
Turn a hardware product idea into an industrial design brief with users, constraints, CMF, ergonomics, and prototype milestones
Review plastic parts before tooling with injection-mould DFM, draft, wall thickness, ribs, bosses, gates, and texture checks
Prepare for a hardware testing, fabrication, or prototyping lab visit with artifacts, questions, acceptance criteria, and follow-up actions
Build and compare manufacturing RFQs across vendors with cost, lead time, quality, terms, and risk scoring
CDSCO regulatory pathway for Class A/B/C/D medical devices in India — MDR 2017 classification, registration, testing, and import/manufacturing licence
Step-by-step BIS/ISI mark and CRS (Compulsory Registration Scheme) process for electronics and electrical products sold in India
Select a free or open-source CAD, CAM, simulation, and documentation toolchain for hardware teams and makers
Structured PCB design review covering schematic correctness, layout quality, signal integrity, and manufacturability
Plan the full journey from prototype to production-ready hardware — phases, milestones, and vendors
Full autonomous loop — research gaps in the directory, find real resources, validate, and open a PR
Select motors, gearboxes, servos, drivers, and local suppliers for robotics and automation projects
Find component distributors and stockists in India for a given component or BOM
Assess supply chain risks for an Indian hardware product — single-source components, import dependency, lead time exposure, and mitigation strategies
